import pandas as pd


def normalize_prices(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    copy = df.copy()
    copy["price"] = copy["price"] / copy["price"].max()
    return copy


def add_full_name(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    new_df = df.copy()
    new_df["full_name"] = new_df["first_name"] + " " + new_df["last_name"]
    return new_df


def filter_and_label(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    result = df.copy()
    result["is_premium"] = result["total_spent"] > 1000
    result["discount"] = result["total_spent"] * 0.1
    return result[result["is_premium"]]
